name: AfdxGetTokenData
title: AfdxGetTokenData
syntax: long AfdxGetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, byte buffer[] ); // form 1
long AfdxGetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, char buffer[] ); // form 2
long AfdxGetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, struct * buffer ); // form 3
description: This function copies a number of bytes from a token's data area to a destination buffer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This is the offset from the beginning of the token's data area. If this is 0, data is copied starting at byte 0 of the token's data area.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: This is the number of bytes to be copied from the token's data area to the specified buffer.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: This is the destination buffer for the copied data. Make sure that the size of the buffer is at least length bytes.

return:
number of copied bytes or 0
With AfdxGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
